$comment: Single source of truth for the landing page feature list. Keep in sync with README.md. When a feature in the engine changes, update it here in the same PR so the page never drifts from the product. The page currently embeds this copy inline in index.html; a future build step can render directly from this file.

features.title: Anti-gaming ratchet
features.summary: Rejects diffs that remove assertions, drop coverage, add skips, or loosen type safety. Runs from a trusted base-branch copy the agent's run does not control.

features.title: Independent checker
features.summary: The role that verifies a change is structurally separate from the role that wrote it, and from the one that merges it.

features.title: Off by default
features.summary: Autonomy and auto-merge stay off until an owner arms them through CI or environment, never through a file the engine can rewrite.

features.title: Bounded work items
features.summary: Tier 1 tests and docs, Tier 2 scripts and schemas. Small, dated, capped, and test-fenced.

features.title: Protected paths
features.summary: CI, secrets, schemas, migrations, lockfiles, and auth wait for owner review through your existing CODEOWNERS.

features.title: Learns with a human in the loop
features.summary: Gate failures and reversions become staged lessons. An owner promotes durable ones into canonical rules and new gates.

features.title: Stack detection
features.summary: Detects Node, Python, Java, and .NET and their gates on adoption. Enterprise mirror mode is on the roadmap for non-Git estates.

features.title: Adopts your repo
features.summary: Uses your CI, code owners, and branch rules on day one. It adds no new platform and no new service.

features.title: Zero tool cost
features.summary: MIT, no telemetry, no service call. Your only cost is the LLM API you choose, and local or already-paid models come first.
